name: loopy-second-brain
description: Connect your Loopy loops with your personal or team knowledge base (Obsidian, Second Brain). Pull loop insights into your vault, push vault activity as signals, and enrich loop analysis with your KB context.
author: LoopyThinking

skills.name: loopy-kb-pull
skills.description: Pull active loops into your vault as structured notes

skills.name: loopy-kb-push
skills.description: Emit signals from vault activity to existing loops

skills.name: loopy-kb-enrich
skills.description: Enrich active loop analysis with context from your vault

skills.name: loopy-org-kb
skills.description: Distribute team loop insights across individual vaults [paid only]

LOOPY_VAULT_PATH.description: Absolute path to your Obsidian vault or Second Brain folder
LOOPY_VAULT_PATH.note: If not set, the agent will ask for folder access at first use
